payload.text: running template/scripts/truth-canary.sh at HEAD catches every seeded fault (ALL-CAUGHT sentinel; the suite prints its own count)

evidence.command: grep -oE 'getattr\(a, "stdin_issues"|os\.environ\.get\("TRUTH_TRACKER_CMD"\)|cmd is None and native is not None|cmd or "bd ready --json"' template/scripts/truth

payload.text: truth ready resolves its source as --stdin, then TRUTH_TRACKER_CMD, then the native work kernel when issue records exist, then bd ready --json (ADR-002 precedence)
